# OwnSuite

> Self-host La Suite numérique, production-ready, on a single server, for a non-profit — K3s, Helmfile, shared SSO, backups included.

OwnSuite: an open-source, production-ready deployment of La Suite numérique on a single server for a non-profit (K3s + Helmfile, shared Keycloak SSO, CloudNativePG, pluggable S3 storage, backups and tested restore).

## Overview

- [Home](https://corentingiraud.github.io/ownsuite/index.md): Project overview and product vision.

## Get started

- [0. Provision (Terraform)](https://corentingiraud.github.io/ownsuite/get-started/provision/index.md): Step 0 — provision the server + object storage with Terraform on Scaleway (recommended) or Infomaniak (optional).
- [1. Prepare the server](https://corentingiraud.github.io/ownsuite/get-started/bootstrap/index.md): Step 1 — one-command server bootstrap into a single-node K3s cluster.
- [2. Install](https://corentingiraud.github.io/ownsuite/get-started/install/index.md): Step 2 — guided installer (suite install), bare server + domain to all-in-HTTPS.

## Operate

- [Users](https://corentingiraud.github.io/ownsuite/operate/users/index.md): User provisioning with the `suite user` CLI (one Keycloak identity, JIT to all apps).
- [Server sizing](https://corentingiraud.github.io/ownsuite/operate/sizing/index.md): Server sizing — minimum and recommended VPS specs (RAM/CPU/disk) per enabled app.
- [Status & monitoring](https://corentingiraud.github.io/ownsuite/operate/status/index.md): Health monitoring with `suite status` (node, database, certificates, backups, per-app pods).
- [Upgrading](https://corentingiraud.github.io/ownsuite/operate/upgrade/index.md): Safe upgrades with `suite upgrade` (backup-gated snapshot, diff, apply, health check, auto rollback).
- [Backups & restore](https://corentingiraud.github.io/ownsuite/operate/backups/index.md): Off-site backups (CNPG PITR, rclone objects) and the tested restore procedure.

## How it works

- [Overview](https://corentingiraud.github.io/ownsuite/understand/overview/index.md): How it works — the moving parts, in plain terms.
- [Under the hood](https://corentingiraud.github.io/ownsuite/understand/platform/index.md): Under the hood — the shared foundation (HTTPS, database, cache, single sign-on) and the order it comes up in.
- [Docs](https://corentingiraud.github.io/ownsuite/understand/docs/index.md): Docs — collaborative documents with single sign-on and file storage.
- [Drive](https://corentingiraud.github.io/ownsuite/understand/drive/index.md): Drive — the file manager, on the same shared foundation.
- [Grist](https://corentingiraud.github.io/ownsuite/understand/grist/index.md): Grist — spreadsheets that behave like a database; optional, off by default.
- [Projects](https://corentingiraud.github.io/ownsuite/understand/projects/index.md): Projects — kanban boards and task management; optional, off by default.
- [Mailbox](https://corentingiraud.github.io/ownsuite/understand/messages/index.md): Mailbox — a full mail provider with webmail; advanced, off by default.
- [Meet](https://corentingiraud.github.io/ownsuite/understand/meet/index.md): Meet — video conferencing on LiveKit; advanced, off by default.
- [Design decisions](https://corentingiraud.github.io/ownsuite/understand/decisions/index.md): Design decisions and their rationale.

## Reference

- [suite CLI](https://corentingiraud.github.io/ownsuite/reference/cli/index.md): The `suite` CLI — every command and flag (install, user, status, upgrade).
- [Configuration](https://corentingiraud.github.io/ownsuite/reference/configuration/index.md): Every `OWNSUITE_*` variable, with defaults, and how to choose which apps to deploy.

## Project

- [Status &amp; roadmap](https://corentingiraud.github.io/ownsuite/project/roadmap/index.md): Status board (Shipped / Optional / Planned) and the product vision.
- [For AI agents](https://corentingiraud.github.io/ownsuite/project/for-ai-agents/index.md): Conventions for AI agents and the documentation.
